title: MDN WebTransport API
citation: MDN Web Docs. WebTransport API. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Browser API capability assessment for low-latency transport planning.
claims_supported: MDN marks WebTransport as Baseline 2026 and newly available since March 2026.
WebTransport uses HTTP/3 transport and supports multiple streams and UDP-like datagrams.
claims_not_supported: That every Azure App Service, proxy, or Hono/Bun deployment path supports WebTransport end to end.
That WebTransport is required for the first single-user demo.
